reviews.comment:
Buena atención.. un poco lento hay q tener paciencia, luego todo bien.....

(Translated by Google)
Good service... a little slow, you have to be patient, then everything's fine...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNob05lNFF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Si hubiera otra opción de YPF en Miramar, no lo piso ni por accidente.
Le piden permiso a un pie para mover el otro.
Tienen 8 surtidores y habilitan 4, se forman una filas de más de una cuadra. Es todos los años el mismo tema, son muuuuy lentos para atender

(Translated by Google)
If there were another YPF station in Miramar, I wouldn't go near it, not even by accident. They're incredibly slow. They have eight pumps but only open four, resulting in lines that stretch for more than a block. It's the same problem every year; they're incredibly slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNob01uYm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Quiero que me regalen Nafta jajajajaj

(Translated by Google)
I want them to give me Nafta hahahahaha
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCXy02bUh3EAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad es que me parecio terrible la atencion, mientran te dejan esperando en el surtidor los playeros se vana charlar y al rato vuelven.

(Translated by Google)
The truth is that I found the service terrible. While they leave you waiting at the pump, the beach attendants go off and chat and come back after a while.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCXzZDUzV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una de las 3 estaciones de servicio de Miramar y una de las más constantemente concurridas. Casi cabeza a cabeza con su competencia. En definitiva la nafta es nafta.

(Translated by Google)
One of Miramar's three gas stations and one of the busiest. It's almost neck and neck with its competitors. Ultimately, gasoline is gasoline.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCejlXX3lBRRAB

reviews.comment:
En temporada hay fila de 150 metros para cargar. La atención es muy buena y ordenada. Van señalizando y pidiendo a cada auto que ingrese al surtidor libre.

(Translated by Google)
During peak season, there's a 150-meter line to fill up. Service is very good and organized. They signal and ask each car to enter the free pump.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbDk3Y1ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Bastante dejado este acá los baños un asco perdón podrían ponerle un poco más de cariño.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms here are quite neglected, they're disgusting. Sorry, they could put a little more care into them.
